capability_families.title: Archive identity, source coverage, freshness, and readiness
Cross-session, row-level, semantic, aggregate, and prior-art search
Exact objects, transcripts, topology, raw evidence, and citations
Grammar, fields, values, plans, refs, result semantics, and recovery
Resume, postmortem, forensic, coordination, and bounded context
Reversible overlays, judgments, saved runs, and administration

client_delivery.mcp_config: Merge only the named polylogue entry in the native Claude MCP configuration.
client_delivery.reference_delivery: Install the generated deep reference as an owned local file.
client_delivery.six_tool_delta: Only the generated content, target manifest, six-tool vocabulary, continuation recipe, and cache digest change.
client_delivery.standing_delivery: Install a SessionStart hook whose additionalContext is the complete generated standing manual.
client_delivery.unchanged: Hook ownership, idempotent merge, role/env selection, drift detection, and lossless uninstall are unchanged.

client_delivery.mcp_config: Merge only [mcp_servers.polylogue] in the native Codex TOML configuration.
client_delivery.reference_delivery: Install the generated deep reference beside the managed guidance.
client_delivery.six_tool_delta: The managed block is regenerated from the six-tool declarations; no 103-tool name list remains.
client_delivery.standing_delivery: Install a marked managed block in the effective global AGENTS.override.md or AGENTS.md without overwriting operator text.
client_delivery.unchanged: Override precedence detection, marker ownership, idempotency, and lossless uninstall are unchanged.

client_delivery.mcp_config: Merge only mcpServers.polylogue in Gemini settings JSON.
client_delivery.reference_delivery: Install the generated deep reference as an owned local file.
client_delivery.six_tool_delta: The persistent instruction and target manifest switch to the six-tool contract.
client_delivery.standing_delivery: Install a marked managed block in GEMINI.md as persistent instruction.
client_delivery.unchanged: JSON merge ownership, marker ownership, idempotency, and lossless uninstall are unchanged.

client_delivery.mcp_config: Merge only mcp_servers.polylogue in Hermes YAML.
client_delivery.reference_delivery: Include the generated deep reference in the owned skill directory.
client_delivery.six_tool_delta: The skill body, recipes, role ladder, and cache digest are regenerated for the six-tool surface.
client_delivery.standing_delivery: Install the complete generated manual inside the owned productivity/polylogue SKILL.md.
client_delivery.unchanged: YAML merge ownership, skill ownership, idempotency, and lossless uninstall are unchanged.

origins.meaning: Repository Beads issue and history records ingested as archive evidence.
Google AI Studio or Drive/Takeout conversation exports.
Imported material whose provider/source could not be classified reliably.

post_cutover_regeneration: Replace or verify every parameterized argument against the final FastMCP schemas.
Run the live signature lane, then set TARGET_SCHEMA_STATUS to live-verified only after exact parity.
Run devtools render agent-manual and devtools render all --check.
Run devtools verify agent-integration --require-live after the target tools and schema marker agree.
